name: Gold member, 20% off LEGO + free shipping
description: Loyalty Middleware response the SFRA login controller consumes on authentication. The storefront joins loyaltyPromotions into session.custom.loyaltyPromotions; the pre-built Dynamic Customer Groups (rule: session.custom.loyaltyPromotions CONTAINS <code>) then activate the matching static PMIDs, unlocking product search (?pmid=) + badging. NOT a Salesforce Loyalty core API, this is the Middleware's own eligible-promotions endpoint that fronts the SF Loyalty voucher/tier query.
notes: SFRA usage (login controller middleware): session.custom.loyaltyPromotions = body.loyaltyPromotions.join(','). The raw codes gate the Dynamic Customer Groups. The promotions[] metadata drives a 'My Rewards' surface directly (one tile per entry from badge/calloutMsg/plpUrl); product entries carry discountPercent + plpUrl, while shipping/points entries (Free Shipping, Double Points) have no plpUrl and link to the rewards landing page instead. OCAPI mobile parity: the same body is set on the session by the dw.ocapi.shop.auth.afterPOST hook. sourceVoucherCode ties each storefront code back to the SF Loyalty voucher the Middleware resolved.
